---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the situation or limitation you're running into. Example: "When playing Commander I have to manually track X because..."

## Describe the feature

A clear description of what you want. What should it look like? How should it behave?

## Why is this valuable?

Who benefits and how often? Is this a common MTG situation or a niche edge case?

## Implementation ideas (optional)

If you have thoughts on how it could be built, share them here — but no need to have a solution.

## Alternatives considered

Have you found any workarounds? Is there an existing feature that partially covers this?
